title: Monodex Config
description: Main configuration for monodex - defines catalogs and optional database path

$schema.description: Part of the JSON Schema standard, this optional keyword declares the URL of the schema that the file conforms to. Editors may download the schema and use it to perform syntax highlighting.

path.description: Path to the database folder. May be an absolute path, or a relative path starting with './' or '../' (resolved against the folder containing monodex-config.json). Tilde (~) and environment variables ($VAR) are not supported. Omit to use the default location.

catalogs.description: Named catalog configurations. Keys are catalog names (kebab-case, 1-64 chars, e.g., my-repo, frontend-app). The schema pattern is intentionally permissive; full syntax is validated at runtime with detailed error messages. May be empty for fresh installations.

embeddingModel.description: Embedding model configuration for memory and CPU tuning

modelInstances.description: Number of ONNX model instances (sessions). Primary driver of memory usage. Use 'auto' for automatic sizing based on available memory.

threadsPerInstance.description: Threads per model instance for intra-op parallelism. CPU tuning only. Use 'auto' for automatic sizing based on CPU cores.

path.description: Path to the catalog root folder. May be an absolute path, or a relative path starting with './' or '../' (resolved against the folder containing monodex-config.json). Tilde (~) and environment variables ($VAR) are not supported.
